name: Lemon Souffle'
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs into yolks and whites.
2. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add half the sugar, a tablespoon at a time, to the beaten egg whites and set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the yolk until thickened.
5. Gradually mix in the remaining sugar, lemon juice, and grated rind from the lemon into the yolks.
6. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the egg white mixture.
7. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
8. Bake for 40 minutes at 325°F with the heat preheated.
